final:
module gray_code_counter(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    output reg [7:0] count
);

reg [7:0] gray_code;

always @(posedge clk or posedge reset)
    if (reset) begin
        gray_code <= 8'b00000000; // Reset binary count to 0
        count <= 8'b00000000; // Reset Gray code count to 0
    end else if (enable) begin
        gray_code <= gray_code + 1; // Increment binary count
        count <= (gray_code >> 1) ^ gray_code; // Convert to Gray code
    end

endmodule
